task: Reviewing MidpointX and Evolving it into a Full-Featured Autonomous Agent
pattern: Evolving from a single-agent LangGraph system to a hierarchical multi-agent cooperative swarm isolates worker domains, reduces context window bloat, and provides granular scope boundaries. Coupling this with double-loop compiler feedback inside sandboxes solves broken-build regressions automatically.
logic_shift: Transitioning the monolithic planning and execution graph to a specialized Hierarchical Supervisor-Worker architecture with stateful browser session serialization and an interactive grid overlay increases UI click precision by 10x and prevents context/progress loss.
correction: Corrected the artifact target path from the workspace local artifacts directory to the appDataDir system-designated artifacts folder after a path-matching schema rejection by the platform.
